name: google-sheets
description: Google Sheets connector — read rows, append, update, clear, delete rows, plus create / inspect spreadsheets. Pick the action with the `operation` input. Auth via a workspace `generic` config holding a service-account JSON (credentialsJson).

configRefs.name: google
configRefs.description: Generic config with credentialsJson — paste the full service-account JSON file from Google Cloud Console. Share each target spreadsheet with that service account's client_email (Editor role for write ops, Viewer for read-only).

operation.description: Which Google Sheets API call to run.

config.description: Workspace config name to read credentials from. Default: 'google'.

spreadsheetId.description: Spreadsheet ID — the long token in the spreadsheet URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/<this part>/edit. Required for everything except spreadsheet.create.

range.description: A1-notation range, e.g. 'Sheet1!A1:D' or 'Sheet1'. Used by sheet.get / sheet.append / sheet.update / sheet.clear. Defaults to 'Sheet1' when omitted.

values.description: 2D array of cell values (rows × columns) for sheet.append / sheet.update. May also be an array of objects when `useHeaders` is true; the plugin maps each object key to the matching header in the sheet's first row.

useHeaders.description: When true, treat the first row of the range as headers. sheet.get returns objects keyed by header; sheet.append accepts objects and writes them under the matching columns. Default: false.

valueInputOption.description: How Google Sheets interprets the written values. RAW writes strings verbatim; USER_ENTERED runs the same parsers as typing into the UI (formulas, dates, numbers).

valueRenderOption.description: How sheet.get returns cell values. FORMATTED_VALUE applies cell formatting; UNFORMATTED_VALUE returns raw numbers/strings; FORMULA returns the cell's formula source.

majorDimension.description: Row-major (one entry per row) or column-major for sheet.get.

sheetId.description: Numeric ID of a sheet inside the spreadsheet. Required by sheet.delete-rows. Find it via spreadsheet.get.

startIndex.description: 0-based row index where deletion starts (inclusive). Used by sheet.delete-rows.

endIndex.description: 0-based row index where deletion stops (exclusive). Used by sheet.delete-rows.

sheetTitles.description: Optional list of sheet (tab) names to initialise the new spreadsheet with. Defaults to ['Sheet1']. Used by spreadsheet.create.

includeGridData.description: When true, spreadsheet.get returns every cell's data (potentially huge). Default: false — metadata only.

operation.description: Echo of the input operation that ran.

status.description: HTTP status from the underlying Sheets REST call.

result.description: Operation-specific payload. Array of rows or objects for sheet.get. ValueRange ack for append/update/clear. Spreadsheet object for spreadsheet.create / spreadsheet.get. Reply object for batchUpdate-based deletes.

url.description: Deep-link to the affected spreadsheet (when applicable).
